top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Descartes reports record revenue amid ‘challenging’ trade landscape
top_signals.summary:
Descartes reported better-than-expected results in its latest quarter as customers use its tools to navigate a changing trade landscape.

The post Descartes reports record revenue amid ‘challenging’ trade landscape appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Nomura's Wang Thinks Asia Chips Rally Mostly Justified
top_signals.summary: Nomura International Wealth Management North Asia CIO Julia Wang says the chips rally in Asia is mostly justified by earnings growth, but she thinks valuation has also reset. Wang speaks with Haslinda Amin from the sidelines of 'Nomura Investment Forum Asia' in Singapore. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Korea’s Wealth Fund to Tap Alternative Assets With Tokyo Office
top_signals.summary: Korea Investment Corp. will open its first office in Tokyo this summer as the $232 billion sovereign wealth fund seeks to expand investments in Japan, including alternative assets such as private equity, hedge funds and private debt.
